summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Iteration 21: Partner/Supplier Profile Pages. All 23 backend API tests passed. All frontend features verified: SupplierProfile modal with Ticra Outdoor as rich example (Pleisureworld badge, podcast, trendwatcher quote, top products, events, USPs), clickable supplier names on product cards and in ChaletWizard, click tracking API working.
passed_tests: GET /api/partners/profiles returns all 5 partner profiles (ticra-outdoor, kunert-group, arcabo, campsolutions, bbs-systeembouw)
GET /api/partners/profiles returns summary fields (id, name, tagline, hero_image, categorieen, pleisureworld_partner, pleisureworld_badge)
GET /api/partners/profiles/ticra-outdoor returns full Ticra profile with Pleisureworld Preferred Partner badge
Ticra profile has podcast section: Leisure Talk #14 — Wellness als verdienmodel (38 min, Richard Otten guest)
Ticra profile has trendwatcher_quote by Richard Otten (Trendwatcher Recreatie & Hospitality)
Ticra profile has top_producten: 3 products with configuraties count (TICRA Hottub 847x, Barrel Sauna 623x, Sunlight Buitendouche 1204x)
Ticra profile has deelname: 4 events (Vakantiebeurs Utrecht 2026, Glamping Show 2025, HISWA te Water 2025, Pleisureworld Summit 2026)
Ticra profile has usps: 5 items (Gratis bezorging, 2 jaar garantie, Professionele installatie, 24/7 service, Leaseconstructies)
Ticra profile has stats: 120+ parken, 15+ jaren ervaring, 2.500+ producten, 4.8/5 klanttevredenheid
Ticra profile has website and blog_url links
GET /api/partners/profiles/kunert-group returns Kunert profile (Pleisureworld Partner since 2023)
GET /api/partners/profiles/arcabo returns Arcabo profile (Pleisureworld Partner since 2024)
GET /api/partners/profiles/campsolutions returns Campsolutions profile (NOT Pleisureworld partner)
GET /api/partners/profiles/nonexistent returns error
POST /api/platform/partners/track registers profile_view interaction
POST /api/platform/partners/track registers website_click interaction
POST /api/platform/partners/track registers blog_click interaction
POST /api/platform/partners/track registers podcast_click interaction
GET /api/products?flow=recreatie wellness products have supplier='Ticra Outdoor'
Wellness products have images from ticraoutdoor.com
GET /api/chalet/suppliers returns suppliers list with Pleisureworld partner badges
GET /api/chalet/models returns models with supplier_name field
GET /api/chalet/upgrade-options/chalet wellness options have Ticra Outdoor supplier
Frontend: Recreatie Step 3 product cards show category label (WELLNESS — TICRA OUTDOOR)
Frontend: Recreatie Step 3 product cards have clickable Ticra Outdoor supplier badge
Frontend: Clicking supplier badge opens SupplierProfile modal
Frontend: SupplierProfile modal shows hero image, Pleisureworld Preferred Partner badge
Frontend: SupplierProfile modal shows stats (120+ Parken, 15+ Ervaring, 2.500+ Geplaatst, 4.8/5 Score)
Frontend: SupplierProfile modal shows Bezoek Website and Lees Blog buttons
Frontend: SupplierProfile modal shows Leisure Talk Podcast section with Beluister Podcast button
Frontend: SupplierProfile modal shows Richard Otten trendwatcher quote
Frontend: SupplierProfile modal shows Top 3 Meest Gekozen via Configuratie with product images and counts
Frontend: SupplierProfile modal shows Evenementen & Deelname tags
Frontend: SupplierProfile modal shows USPs and Pleisureworld Partner CTA
Frontend: ChaletWizard right panel supplier name is clickable and opens SupplierProfile
Frontend: ChaletWizard model cards supplier name is clickable and opens SupplierProfile
Frontend: ChaletWizard Samenstellen tab shows Wellness — Ticra Outdoor section with 8 upgrade options
Frontend: Wellness upgrade options have real product images from ticraoutdoor.com
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - all partner profile data is hardcoded in partner_profiles.py PARTNER_PROFILES dict
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 21 verified Partner/Supplier Profile Pages. Key findings: 1) Partner Profiles API: 5 partners (ticra-outdoor, kunert-group, arcabo, campsolutions, bbs-systeembouw). Ticra Outdoor is the rich example with podcast, trendwatcher quote, top products, events, USPs. 2) SupplierProfile modal: Opens from product cards in Recreatie Step 3 and from ChaletWizard (right panel, model cards, samenstellen tab). Shows all sections: hero image, Pleisureworld badge, stats, description, website/blog buttons, podcast section, trendwatcher quote, top 3 products, events, USPs, Pleisureworld CTA. 3) Click tracking: POST /api/platform/partners/track works for profile_view, website_click, blog_click, podcast_click. 4) Product cards: Show category label (e.g., 'WELLNESS — TICRA OUTDOOR') and clickable supplier badge. 5) ChaletWizard Samenstellen: Wellness section shows 8 Ticra Outdoor upgrade options with real product images. 6) All 4 flows still working: Recreatie, Chalet, FEC, Dashboard. 7) Dutch language UI throughout.
